mapper.select: select id, name, sort, use_count, status, remark, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from osh_tool_tag where name = #{name} limit 1
mapper.update: update osh_tool_tag set delete_flag = 0, status = 1, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, sort, use_count, status, remark, delete_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from osh_tool_tag where delete_flag = 0 and status = 1 order by use_count desc, sort desc, id asc

select t.name from osh_tool_tag_rel r inner join osh_tool_tag t on t.id = r.tag_id where r.tool_id = #{toolId} and r.delete_flag = 0 and t.delete_flag = 0 and t.status = 1 order by t.sort desc, t.id asc
mapper.update: update osh_tool_tag_rel set delete_flag = 1, update_by = #{operator}, update_time = now() where tool_id = #{toolId} and delete_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into osh_tool_tag_rel ( tool_id, tag_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, delete_flag ) values ( #{toolId}, #{tagId}, #{operator}, now(), #{operator}, now(), 0 ) on duplicate key update delete_flag = 0, update_by = values(update_by), update_time = now()
mapper.update: update osh_tool_tag set use_count = use_count + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{tagId} and delete_flag = 0
